task: Evaluate whether to start with HVAC owner introductions through brother's service-business network or with HVAC distribution relationships.

recommendation.summary: Start with direct introductions to HVAC owners through the brother's network. Use distribution experience as credibility and context, but not as the first go-to-market channel.

rationale: Closer proximity to revenue-linked operational pain
Faster product discovery from direct workflow exposure
Higher probability of converting early pilots into paid engagements
Distribution contacts are useful but one step removed from the core buyer
best_initial_offers: after-hours AI intake and callback workflows
risks_of_leading_with_distribution: Higher chance of solving the wrong problem first
next_steps: Identify the most repeated painful workflow
Sell one fixed-scope pilot tied to a measurable outcome
Use pilot results to create a repeatable offer
